description_long: This is a modern, single-family house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, featuring solar panels and a rooftop terrace. The exterior is primarily white with some sections of light gray and brick accents, and large windows provide ample natural light. The house includes a garage with a roll-up door, a main entryway with a small porch, and landscaped areas with several mature trees. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a paved street, with parked cars visible in front. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller, rectangular ones. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat and sloped roof, solar panels, large windows, and a garage, surrounded by trees and bordered by a street.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the backyard, trees, and the open layout with visible interior spaces.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade, featuring the garage, main entryway, and the street with parked cars.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, emphasizing the flat roof, solar panels, and additional trees.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a top-down perspective, showcasing the roof structure, rooftop terrace, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, single modern door, and minimal overhang, adjacent to the garage entrance.
